articles.title: Cervical cancer deaths fall to zero in young women given vaccine - BBC
articles.description: A new study finds that hundreds of lives have been saved since school-age girls were offered the HPV jab in 2008.
articles.content: Boys have also been given the HPV vaccine since 2019, which helps to protect them against anal, penis, throat and mouth cancers, and reduces the risk of them passing the virus on to girls.
